message:
chore(deps): switch fsqlite deps from local paths to crates.io v0.1.0

All 24 fsqlite crates are now published on crates.io. Replace absolute
path dependencies with version specifiers so the project builds without
requiring a local frankensqlite checkout.

Closes #48

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -70,9 +70,9 @@ tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["env-filter"] }
 sha2 = "0.10"
 hmac = "0.12"  # HMAC for optional short-code hardening (ksk.1.10)
 fs2 = "0.4"
-fsqlite = { path = "/dp/frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite", features = ["fts5"] }  # FrankenSQLite with concurrent writing
-fsqlite-types = { path = "/dp/frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite-types" }  # SqliteValue type
-fsqlite-error = { path = "/dp/frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite-error" }  # FrankenError type
+fsqlite = { version = "0.1.0", features = ["fts5"] }  # FrankenSQLite with concurrent writing
+fsqlite-types = "0.1.0"  # SqliteValue type
+fsqlite-error = "0.1.0"  # FrankenError type
 ctrlc = "3.5.1"
 flate2 = "1.0"  # Gzip compression for history export
